posts.text:
We can make policy choices that lower poverty and increase the amount of pay American families take home.


PolicyEngine US (@PolicyEngineUS)

NEW ANALYSIS: @SenBooker's Keep Your Pay Act - higher standard deduction, expanded CTC & EITC, higher top tax rates.

Static model finds:
- $5.2T 10-year cost
- 73% of households gain, 1.6% lose in 2026
- Poverty falls 10% in 2026

We also provide a personalized calculator.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/PolicyEngineUS/status/2031315168181751956#

posts.text:
When Donald Trump relentlessly attacks judges and the rule of law, it doesn’t just erode trust in our institutions—it can put lives at risk.

In a democracy, disagreements with court decisions are settled with arguments and appeals, not intimidation and threats.

Trump's chaos, cruelty, and corruption is truly dangerous.

Video
